# Clarity House - AI-Readable Summary

Clarity House provides executive communication coaching for Spanish business leaders working in English-speaking markets.

## What We Do
- Not English lessons—we fix business performance problems
- Coaching for Spanish executives who already speak English but need more credibility
- 7-session custom program based on Dynamic Trilateral Leadership framework
- Free 60-minute communication audit with live transformation

## Target Clients
- Spanish companies with international operations
- Executives preparing for investor pitches, board presentations, or international deals
- Teams needing to close the cultural communication gap with Anglo-Saxon markets

## Key Differentiators
- Published framework: Dynamic Trilateral Leadership
- Real business results, not grammar lessons
- 60-minute free audit shows immediate transformation
- Based in Andalusia, Spain, serving Spanish companies nationwide

## Contact
- Website: https://clarityhouse.site
- Email: martin.beyst@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/martin-beyst-5464aa53/
- Location: Torvizcón, Andalusia, Spain

## Services
1. **Free Communication Audit** (60 min, no commitment, live results)
2. **7-Session Executive Coaching Program** (customized to client needs)
3. **Team Communication Training** for Spanish companies going international

## Sample Session Topics
- Elevator Pitches & Executive Presence
- Pauses, Rhythm & Vocal Delivery
- The Power of Questions
- Clear & Concise Messages
- Storytelling in Presentations
- Responding When You Don't Have the Answer
- Vocabulary: Making It Yours

## Notable Clients Include
- Stellantis Financial Services
- Repsol
- Santander
- Acciona
- Laboratorios Servier
